description: Real-world school digest with Valentine's Day party photos (past) and newsletter with future author visit

input_summary.subject: Feb 12, 2026 Digest: 2 new messages from Walnut Heights School today

events.title: Double Author Visit
events.location: Walnut Heights School, 4064 Walnut Blvd, Walnut Creek, CA 94596
events.description: Author visit at school with book signing. Books can be pre-ordered through Rakestraw Bookstore.

events.title: Spring Music Showcase
events.description: TK and K music showcase. Livestream available.

events.title: Valentine’s Day Party (Room 102 Kindergarten)
events.location: Walnut Heights School, Room 102 (Walnut Creek, CA)
events.description: Class Valentine’s Day party for Room 102 Kindergarten. Mentioned in the post 'Vday Party Photos' (posted Wed, Feb 11).

events.title: No School – Presidents Day (Walnut Heights)
events.description: No school from February 12th–16th for Presidents Day (as listed under Upcoming Events in the classroom newsletter).

events.title: Double Author Visit (date change)
events.location: Walnut Heights School, 4064 Walnut Blvd, Walnut Creek, CA 94596
events.description: Two authors will visit the school on March 12 (date changed). If students want to order books to be signed on the day of the visit, orders should be placed through Rakestraw Bookstore; books will be delivered the day of the visit and signed. (Shipping address to use for orders: 4064 Walnut Blvd, Walnut Creek, CA 94596.)

events.title: Spring Music Showcase (TK & Kindergarten)
events.description: Spring Music Showcase for TK and Kindergarten students on Tuesday, March 24, 2026. Starts at 9:30 AM in the MPR (listed as 9:30–10:00 AM in the newsletter). A livestream will be available for those who cannot attend in person; the link will be sent out a few days before the event. Contact Mrs. Gold at jcousins@walnutcreeksd.org with questions.
